title: cyperus lacustris
intro: Cyperus lacustris, also known as lake cyperus or lake papyrus, is a perennial aquatic plant species that belongs to the sedge family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cyperus lacustris include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its essential oil can also be extracted for use in aromatherapy and other applications.
